scripts.lint: if [ -n "$(find articles books -name '*.md' 2>/dev/null)" ]; then textlint "articles/**/*.md" "books/**/*.md"; else echo 'No markdown files to lint.'; fi
scripts.lint:fix: if [ -n "$(find articles books -name '*.md' 2>/dev/null)" ]; then textlint --fix "articles/**/*.md" "books/**/*.md"; else echo 'No markdown files to lint.'; fi
